sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115379" key="yafaro/qric" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψᾰφᾰρόθριξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τρῐχος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n115379.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with dry, rough hair</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">coat,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μῆλα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg019.perseus-grc1:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Pan.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
